Document:
# Rule 5: Bug Exploitation and Foul Play Do not exploit bugs or unintended features to gain an unfair advantage for yourself or your team.
## NOT a violation: - Setting up keybinds or macros using the in-game keybind settings or the bind command.
## Examples of violations: - Using autoclickers, non-gameplay macros. - Using scripts/modifications to automatically aim at other players, disable shadows, or see through walls. - Construction of barricades on water or other surfaces clearly not intended for construction. - Building unfinished structures for defense purposes, such as unfinished locks. - Manufacturing chemicals that are not available in [textlink=“Chemicals” link=“RMCChemicals”]. - Nesting one vault into another in order to hold more than would otherwise fit, except for specialized boxes (for grenades, flyers, etc.). - Using the helmets of medics or technicians in order to get free medivisor or protection from welding, if you do not have the corresponding in-game skills, medicine 2 or engineering 2. - Quickly, repeatedly pressing the shuttle lock button.
